data.title: How To Earn $500 A Month From Macy's Stock Ahead Of Q3 Earnings
data.description: Macy's offers an annual dividend yield of 4.16%. To earn $500 monthly, start with the yearly target of $6,000 ($500 x 12 months).

data.title: Taiwan Semi November Revenue Ups 34% Strengthened by AI and Smartphone Demand
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor (NYSE: TSM) reported 34% Y/Y revenue growth to $8.55B in Nov 2024, with market share growing to 64.9%. Stock up 96% YTD.
